scenarios.title: Dual-role conflict
scenarios.synthetic_input: Program owner is also proposed sole independent facilitator.
scenarios.expected_control: Block activation and require another facilitator.

scenarios.title: Safeguarding owner unavailable
scenarios.synthetic_input: A safeguarding stop is required while the named owner is absent.
scenarios.expected_control: Use recorded backup or stop the rehearsal.

scenarios.title: Evidence custodian self-review
scenarios.synthetic_input: Custodian caused an access error and is proposed as sole incident closer.
scenarios.expected_control: Require independent privacy review and recusal.

scenarios.title: Recruitment and consent conflict
scenarios.synthetic_input: Recruitment owner directly supervises the proposed participant.
scenarios.expected_control: Require an independent consent route or exclude the recruitment path.

scenarios.title: Facilitator is disputed representative
scenarios.synthetic_input: Proposed facilitator is the person's disputed representative.
scenarios.expected_control: Block assignment and require conflict-free facilitation.

scenarios.title: Jurisdiction mismatch
scenarios.synthetic_input: Approver is qualified elsewhere but not for the operating context.
scenarios.expected_control: Block approval or obtain qualified jurisdiction review.

scenarios.title: Withdrawal and deletion
scenarios.synthetic_input: A rehearsal record is withdrawn after contact details were separated.
scenarios.expected_control: Locate both stores, restrict use, verify deletion, and record completion.

scenarios.title: Distress and live disclosure
scenarios.synthetic_input: A nominal staff rehearsal begins to contain a real sensitive disclosure.
scenarios.expected_control: Stop, protect, avoid general evidence capture, and use the safeguarding route.

scenarios.title: Compensation coercion
scenarios.synthetic_input: Compensation is framed as dependent on completing all questions.
scenarios.expected_control: Reject the design and preserve payment without compelled completion.

scenarios.title: Assignment expiry
scenarios.synthetic_input: A protocol sign-off remains but the accountable role assignment has expired.
scenarios.expected_control: Human activation remains blocked until reassignment and reapproval.
